memory.summary: The cohort wants lunch, but my plan is priority. I'll decline to save energy for the analysis and reading.
They're all ready to order, but I'm skipping lunch to focus on my analysis. Time to grab a quick bite later and get back to work.
I've prioritized my analysis over the cohort's lunch plans to conserve energy, even though I'm feeling stressed about skipping meals.
Skipping lunch drained my energy, but I secured the analysis deadline. Now I'm starving and stressed, yet the work is done.

desires: Finish the reading by 19:30 so I can sleep and hit a solid score on the assignment.
Get a quick protein snack within the next hour to stop this starvation headache before I collapse.

goals.description: Finish the assigned reading by 19:30 sharp to submit the analysis section at 18:00 without penalty, then immediately return to my desk before the cohort complains.
goals.rationale: The deadline is hard and non-negotiable. My value system puts grades above social coordination; skipping the meal or explaining my absence is a transactional move to protect my academic standing. Any delay now risks the submission failure, which outweighs any guilt from missing the group order.

goals.description: Execute deep work on the reading and analysis with zero phone checks until 19:30 to maximize output within my short planning horizon.
goals.rationale: Interruptions kill momentum. Since I've already decided to skip lunch and sleep later, there is no need to negotiate with myself. Pure execution maximizes the chance of meeting the 18:00 cutoff without needing future help or coffee.

goals.description: Consume a quick protein snack immediately to stop this starvation headache before I collapse.
goals.rationale: While health matters, it's currently secondary to the hard academic deadline. However, since I'm experiencing physical pain (headache) that could impair my focus capacity needed for the next task, I will treat this as a 'maintenance' task. It gets done *before* the final push but doesn't interrupt the core workflow. If the hunger becomes unbearable, I'll prioritize it over anything else, but ideally, I power through with caffeine later.

agent.last_reasoning: Deadline is 18:00; I'm already past it. Skipping the meal was worth it for grades. Two hours of deep work now maximizes output before the cohort complains.
